title: BSNC Promotes Haven Harris to Vice President of Corporate Development
summary: BSNC is pleased to announce the promotion of shareholder Haven Harris to Vice President of Corporate Development. As Vice President of Corporate Development, Harris is responsible for decisions related to business development, contract capture and corporate support services. He will work with Senior...

title: The EU as an Actor in the Arctic
summary: This article provides a reading of the EU’s Arctic policy (EUPA) and the future of EU governance in the Arctic. The post The EU as an Actor in the Arctic appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
